scripts.build:vendor: mkdir -p public/vendor && cp node_modules/openpgp/dist/openpgp.min.js node_modules/marked/marked.min.js node_modules/dompurify/dist/purify.min.js node_modules/@highlightjs/cdn-assets/highlight.min.js node_modules/lucide/dist/umd/lucide.min.js public/vendor/ && cp node_modules/@highlightjs/cdn-assets/styles/atom-one-dark.min.css public/vendor/
